title: import method ValidateVolumeOpts from libpod
body:
move ValidateVolumeOpts from libpod to buildah so libpod can vendor it in.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, although we should have a couple of tests for this to make sure we support the additional options.

Line 266 should probably not be a strings. Join() on all the options.
